rulings.Case Title: ALEXANDER VILDERMAN VS. BANK OF AMERICA N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 20, 2013, line 1 - DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.,and RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendants' Demurrer to First Amended Complaint is continued to June 12, 2013 on Court's own motion. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must notify the other party of its intent to appear by 4 p.m. =(501/PJB)

rulings.Case Title: CARMEN VALDEZ-MADRANOS VS. MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP, A BUSINESS ENTITY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Further Discovery Responses And Req. For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 20, 2013, line 2 - PLAINTIFF CARMEN VALDEZ-MADRANOS' Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses And Request For Monetary Sanctions. Plaintiffs' Motion to Compel Further Discovery Responses is OFF CALENDAR, untimely per CCP 1005. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must notify the other party of its intent to appear by 4 p.m. =(501/PJB)

rulings.Case Title: CARMEN VALDEZ-MADRANOS VS. MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP, A BUSINESS ENTITY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set Two, And Request For Production Of Documents, Set Two; Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 20, 2013, line 2 - DEFENDANT MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP, And CP SF PROPERTY III, LLC's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set Two, And Request For Production Of Documents, Set Two; Request For Monetary Sanctions. Defendants' Motion to Compel Further Responses to Special Interrogatories and Request for Production. Parties are ordered to appear at 9:00 a.m. am engage in meaningful meet and confer efforts. Parties to report to the Court at 9:30 a.m. if any issues remain unresolved. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must notify the other party of its intent to appear by 4 p.m.=(501/PJB)

rulings.Case Title: M. KHAVUL VS. CEARNAL, PERPETUA, A/K/A PEP CEARNAL et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 20, 2013, line 7 - PLAINTIFF M. KHAVUL's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Judgment GRANTED, subject to opposition. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must notify the other party of its intent to appear by 4 p.m =(501/PJB)

rulings.Case Title: RECOVERY SURVIVAL NETWORK VS. LATISHA BESS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 20, 2013, line 3 - DEFENDANT LATISHA BESS's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's Motion to Strike First Mended Complaint is GRANTED with 5-day leave to amend for Plaintiff to verify complaint with a signature of an officer of the corporation in compliance with CCP 446. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must notify the other party of its intent to appear by 4 p.m. =(501/PJB)

rulings.Case Title: THE TIDES CENTER, VS. REYNALDO TRUJILLO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 20, 2013, line 4 - DEFENDANT REYNALDO TRUJILLO's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. Defendant's Motion to Quash Service of Summons is DENIED, 5 days to answer. Moving party improperly raises factual disputes. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must notify the other party of its intent to appear by 4 p.m. =(501/PJB)

rulings.Case Title: JENNIE HORN VS. ELLEN SMITH et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 20, 2013, line 5 - DEFENDANT ELLEN SMITH and FRANK LAURIA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendants' Demurer to Complaint is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Defendant improperly raises issues of fact regarding rent increase. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must notify the other party of its intent to appear by 4 p.m. =(501/PJB)

rulings.Case Title: ANGELO WILSON VS. PHILLIP GARCIA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 20, 2013, line 6 - DEFENDANT PHILLIP GARCIA's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. Defendant's Motion to Quash is GRANTED. Copy filed with the Court was also missing page 2. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must notify the other party of its intent to appear by 4 p.m. = (501/PJB)
